'''鈭歸-f-ng-d''' ('''kawafngedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waltz|waltz]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-ng-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waltz|waltz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-f-ng-d
|-
! Lemma
| kawafngedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwafngedoko|thiwafngedoko]] || [[word:jiwafngedoko|jiwafngedoko]] || [[word:shiwafngedoko|shiwafngedoko]] || [[word:kiwafngedoko|kiwafngedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwafngedoko|thuthuwafngedoko]] || [[word:jujuwafngedoko|jujuwafngedoko]] || [[word:shushuwafngedoko|shushuwafngedoko]] || [[word:kukuwafngedoko|kukuwafngedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
